$comment: Prebextor's patches/ registry. Each entry is a single .patch file with
the metadata needed for apply-patches.sh to validate the target file,
apply the patch idempotently, and revert it cleanly on undeploy.
Schema fields:
id           — kebab-case unique id (used as backup marker file)
description  — one-line human summary
target       — file inside Hermes-agent that the patch modifies,
relative to $HERMES_HOME/.. (i.e., absolute-ish path)
patch        — filename inside patches/ (must live alongside this manifest)
idempotency  — strategy apply-patches.sh uses to verify the patch
hasn't already been applied (so re-running is safe):
sentinel         — string that, if found anywhere in target, means
patch IS already applied
expected_sha256  — SHA-256 of target BEFORE patch is applied; if
the live file matches this hash, patch can apply
cleanly. Optional but recommended — lets
apply-patches.sh refuse to install over a Hermes
checkout that has drifted from upstream
baseline_sha256 — SHA-256 of target AFTER patch is applied. Used to
confirm a previous install by this script succeeded
(so we don't keep re-patching)
hermes_min_version  — minimum Hermes-agent version this patch applies
cleanly against. Hermes-agent git SHA or tag.
hermes_tested_at    — date last verified end-to-end on this target
requires            — list of prereq entries that must be installed
for this patch to be effective (e.g., the
prebextor plugin itself must be present)
rollback            — how undeploy.sh reverses this patch:
backup_extension  — extension for the backup file apply-patches.sh
creates before patching. undeploy.sh will
restore this file if it exists.
marker_extension  — extension of the empty file apply-patches.sh
creates after successful patch — used by
verify.py and undeploy.sh to detect the patch

patches.description: Add Prebextor to web_tools backend candidates; route prebextor availability through plugin registry (not direct import); normalize envelope vs raw-list response shapes in web_extract dispatcher.

idempotency.sentinel: Prebextor is a user-plugin backend; availability is determined via

metadata.schema_intent: Install-time patch set owned by the Prebextor project, applied to the user's Hermes-agent checkout by scripts/apply-patches.sh. Patches are designed to be idempotent, atomic, and reversible by scripts/undeploy.sh.
